prompt: Create the floating widget overlay window — it should be transparent, always on top, draggable, and show a list of shortcuts grouped by category. Include the XAML and code-behind.

assertions.text: Code-behind applies ForceTopmost fix via SetWindowPos P/Invoke
Code-behind hides window from Alt+Tab via WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW
Implements drag-to-move via DragMove() on MouseLeftButtonDown
Shortcuts are grouped by category in the UI
Uses data binding to a ViewModel rather than hardcoded data
